headline: Morgan Stanley Lifts Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) PT on Updated Biopharma Models
summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated (NASDAQ:VRTX) is included among the Top 10 Reddit Stocks That Will Skyrocket. On April 10, Morgan Stanley raised its price recommendation on Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated (NASDAQ:VRTX) to $612 from $596. It maintained an Overweight rating on the shares. The firm said it updated its models across its biopharma coverage, reflecting IQVIA trends […]
